parameters.subject: =Milestone Overdue: {{$json.title}}
parameters.html: =Dear {{$json.RecipientName}}, This is to formally notify you that the milestone {{$json.title}} has exceeded its planned completion date and is currently overdue. Milestone Status * Milestone Name: {{$json.title}} * Planned End Date: {{$json.end_date}} * Overdue By: {{$json.overdue_days}} days * Current Status: {{$json.status}} Impact & Action Required The delay may impact dependent tasks and overall project timelines. We request an immediate status update along with a recovery or mitigation plan. Regards, PMO – Escalation Desk

parameters.query:
SELECT
  m.id                    AS milestone_id,
  m.title                 AS milestone_title,
  m.end_date              AS milestone_end_date,

  -- overdue calculation
  DATEDIFF(CURDATE(), DATE(m.end_date)) AS overdue_days,

  pm.id                   AS project_id,
  pm.title                AS project_title,

  -- milestone owner
  mo.email                AS milestone_owner_email,

  -- project manager
  pmo.email               AS project_manager_email,

  -- team member
  tm.id                   AS team_user_id,
  tm.firstname           AS team_user_first_name,
  tm.lastname            AS team_user_last_name,
  tm.email                AS team_user_email

FROM milestones m

-- milestone owner
JOIN users mo
  ON mo.id = m.owner_id

-- project
JOIN project_managements pm
  ON pm.id = m.project_management_id

-- project manager
JOIN users pmo
  ON pmo.id = pm.owner_id

-- project team
JOIN project_team_members ptm
  ON ptm.project_team_id = pm.project_team_id

-- team members
JOIN users tm
  ON tm.id = ptm.user_id

WHERE
  DATE(m.end_date) < CURDATE()
  AND (m.status IS NULL OR m.status != 'Completed');
